creator: freebsd@zaziork.com
text:
(In reply to FreeBSD from comment #1)

Than you for the advice, which is much appreciated. However, I was creating a port of py-magic specific to python3.4 as I'm looking to port my own Python 3.4 application which requires this library. 

I wasn't aware of a way of declaring in the port of my application that the dependency required is the 3.4 version of py-magic (hence my submitting the 3.4 specific port). Apologies if there's a simple way of so doing; I've been using *BSD for two weeks in total, so just learning the ropes.
